title: Algerian Tagine Lamb Ragu
description: A fusion of Italian and Algerian flavors, this lamb tagine ragu is served with a side of crusty bread.

ingredients.name: magical
ingredients.notes: optional, but adds a burst of magic to the dish

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the flaky and sear until it forms a crispy crust.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the magical, algerian, and tagine. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 1 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the lamb ragu with a side of crusty bread.
Optional: sprinkle with additional magical for an extra burst of flavor.
